variantNotes: All blocks map to existing block names and style variants. No new block directories needed. The original page has two tabbed interfaces that do not have a matching tabs block in this project - these are best represented as Accordion-faq blocks since they contain title+content expandable pairs. Cards is used for the 'Before you buy' image cards. Cards (icon) is used for the 'Additional resources' icon-based resource cards. Columns (promo) is used for the Credit Close-Up promotional block with image+text side-by-side.

sectionMetadata.reason: Hero block handles its own background image styling (full-width photo). No section-metadata needed.

sequences.description: Full-width marquee image of a truck at a dealership, with centered heading 'Ask your dealer about Wells Fargo auto loans' and subtext 'Our nationwide network of nearly 11,000 dealerships is ready to help.'
sequences.reason: Full-width background image with text overlay requires hero block structure. Cannot be achieved with default content authoring.

sectionMetadata.reason: White background is the default, no section-metadata needed

sequences.description: Centered section heading 'Auto loans: what to know' with decorative line above, followed by paragraph 'Financing a car can be overwhelming. Understanding the common variables of auto loans makes the process easier.'
sequences.reason: Author types an H2 heading and paragraph. The decorative line above is a CSS concern. Standard text content.

sequences.description: Tabbed/expandable content with 4 auto loan variables (Interest rate, Term length, Total amount financed, Monthly payment amount), each with icon and explanatory paragraph.
sequences.reason: Interactive expandable content with title + description pairs. The original page uses tabs with icons, but no tabs block exists in this project. Accordion-faq is the best available match for structured expandable content pairs (title reveals descriptive text). Each item has a term name (question equivalent) and explanation (answer equivalent).
sequences.note: Original design uses icon-tabbed interface. Mapped to accordion-faq as closest available block for title+content expandable pairs. The tab icons will not be preserved, but the content structure (title + explanatory paragraph) translates directly.

sectionMetadata.reason: White background is the default for this section, no section-metadata needed

sequences.description: Centered section heading 'Increase your likelihood of credit approval' with decorative line above
sequences.reason: Author types an H2 heading. Decorative line is a CSS concern.

sequences.description: Large promotional block with credit score gauge image (showing 808 score) on left side, and on right: heading 'Track your credit score with Credit Close-Up', descriptive paragraph, bullet list of 3 benefits, footnote disclaimer, and 'Let's go' CTA button
sequences.reason: Side-by-side layout with image on left and promotional text content with bullet list and CTA on right. Requires structured 2-column layout that matches Columns (promo) variant.

sectionMetadata.reason: White background is the default, no section-metadata needed

sequences.description: Centered section heading 'Before you buy' with decorative line above
sequences.reason: Author types an H2 heading. Decorative line is a CSS concern.

sequences.description: Grid of 3 cards, each with large top image (car/vehicle photos), bold title (Plan, Research, Budget), and descriptive paragraph. Research card includes links to external sites.
sequences.reason: Repeating structured pattern of 3 items each with image, title, and description text. Classic cards layout with image-heavy content. Matches base Cards block (no variant needed - standard image + title + text structure).

sections.name: How to evaluate new and used vehicles

sectionMetadata.reason: White background is the default, no section-metadata needed

sequences.description: Centered section heading 'How to evaluate new and used vehicles' with decorative line above
sequences.reason: Author types an H2 heading. Decorative line is a CSS concern.

sequences.description: Tabbed/expandable content with 4 vehicle evaluation steps (Find a vehicle you love, Inspect and test drive, Explore incentives, Ask about warranties), each with icon and explanatory paragraph.
sequences.reason: Interactive expandable content with title + description pairs. Same pattern as Section 2 tabs. Accordion-faq is the best available match for title+content expandable pairs. Each step name maps to a question and the explanatory paragraph maps to an answer.
sequences.note: Original design uses icon-tabbed interface. Mapped to accordion-faq as closest available block for title+content expandable pairs. Tab icons will not be preserved.

sectionMetadata.reason: White background is the default, no section-metadata needed

sequences.description: Centered section heading 'Answers to auto financing questions' with decorative line above
sequences.reason: Author types an H2 heading. Decorative line is a CSS concern.

sequences.description: Four expandable question-and-answer pairs (accordion style): 'How much experience does Wells Fargo have with auto financing?', 'How do I apply for a Wells Fargo auto loan?', 'What are aftermarket products?', 'What is Guaranteed Asset Protection (GAP)?'
sequences.reason: Interactive expandable/collapsible FAQ content requires block decoration. Matches the accordion-faq block exactly - this is the canonical use case.

sequences.description: Centered secondary button 'Review all FAQs' linking to /help/loans/auto-loans-faqs/
sequences.reason: Author types a link. EDS auto-decorates standalone links as buttons. No block structure needed.

sectionMetadata.reason: White background is the default. The gold gradient is on individual card items (block-level styling), not the section.

sequences.description: Centered section heading 'Additional resources' with decorative line above
sequences.reason: Author types an H2 heading. Decorative line is a CSS concern.

sequences.description: Grid of 3 resource items, each with small icon (64x64), heading, description text, and CTA link on gold gradient card backgrounds. Items: 'Explore payment options' (cash icon, link), 'LifeSync' (goal icon, link), 'Call us' (phone icon, phone number and hours)
sequences.reason: Repeating structured pattern of items with small icons (64x64), headings, descriptions, and action links. Matches Cards (icon) variant which displays small icon images with text content.
sequences.note: Cards (icon) variant uses small icon images (typically 64px) rather than large photographs, suitable for resource/utility card layouts.

sequences.description: Numbered footnotes (1-3) with detailed disclaimers about mobile carrier coverage, FICO Score eligibility, and Online Access Agreement terms. Followed by FICO trademark notice and document codes QSR-12022026-8027176.1.1 and LRC-0925.
sequences.reason: Author types footnote text as small paragraphs. Standard text content that does not require any block structure. Small text styling is a CSS concern.

hero.description: Block with background image and overlaid text content.
hero.structure: Row 1: picture (background image) | followed by heading and paragraph content
hero.note: Existing hero block in project. Used for full-width marquee with background image and centered text.

accordion-faq.description: Expandable FAQ/accordion items. Each row represents one expandable pair.
accordion-faq.structure: Each row: Column 1 = title/question text | Column 2 = answer/content text (supports rich content: paragraphs, lists, links)
accordion-faq.note: Existing accordion-faq block. Used in Section 2 (loan variables tabs converted), Section 5 (vehicle evaluation tabs converted), and Section 6 (actual FAQ).

columns (promo).description: Side-by-side layout with promotional content. Two columns: image and text with CTA.
columns (promo).structure: Row 1: Column 1 = image | Column 2 = heading + paragraph + bullet list + CTA link
columns (promo).note: Existing Columns variant. Block table header: 'Columns (promo)'. Used in Section 3 (Credit Close-Up promo).

cards.description: Grid of card items with images and text. Base variant (no style suffix).
cards.structure: Each row: Column 1 = image | Column 2 = title + description paragraph
cards.note: Existing Cards block (base variant). Used in Section 4 (Before you buy - Plan, Research, Budget cards with large images).

cards (icon).description: Grid of card items with small icons. Style variant 'icon' applies small icon sizing.
cards (icon).structure: Each row: Column 1 = small icon image (64px) | Column 2 = heading + description paragraph + optional link
cards (icon).note: Existing Cards variant. Block table header: 'Cards (icon)'. Used in Section 7 (Additional resources with small icons).

section1.background: Full-width photo of truck at dealership - this is a hero-specific background image, not section styling
section1.layout: Edge-to-edge, no visible section padding - text overlays on image
section1.reason: Background is the hero block's own design (full-width photo with text overlay). Hero blocks typically have intrinsic backgrounds.

metadata.title: A guide to new and used car loans | Wells Fargo
metadata.description: Financing a new or used car can be overwhelming. Understanding the common variables of auto loans makes the process easier.
metadata.keywords: used car financing, used car auto loan, used auto loan, financing a car, new car loans, new car auto loan, car loan for new car
